arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Wonderkid with staggering goal record completes long-awaited Old Trafford move
arts.sum: Wonderkid Chibo Obi Martin confirms his move to Manchester United, joining the club following his departure from Arsenal over the summer.

arts.ttl: Steve McClaren opens up on working under Erik ten Hag as former Man United No 2 reveals the moment he thought this was 'the end' for under-fire manager
arts.sum: Ten Hag has been in charge of United since the summer of 2022, but it's been a mixed journey with trophies won but the Red Devils often struggling on the field and in the Premier league.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy wary of replacing Erik ten Hag as feelings on Man Utd job emerge
arts.sum: The former Manchester United striker will be offered the manager's job on an interim basis if Erik ten Hag is sacked after Sunday's trip to Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Obi-Martin confirms Man Utd move after Arsenal exit
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin has confirmed on his personal social media account that he has joined Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa rejected Bayern Munich offer for young player Unai Emery sees as a potential superstar
arts.sum: Aston Villa are currently flying high in all competitions and could go fourth in the Premier League table ahead of the international break. Unai Emery’s...

arts.ttl: Man United chiefs and Joel Glazer 'hold emergency meeting' to make Erik ten Hag future decision
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's future at Manchester United is hanging by a thread ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash away at Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye bid for Wharton; Real Madrid's plan to sign Alexander-Arnold revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona and Atletico Madrid are interested in signing Thomas Partey once his contract expires in summer 2025. Arsenal are plotting a move for 18-year-old Barcelona starlet Arnau Pradas .

arts.ttl: Career suicide? Legend slams Zirkzee's Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Ruud Gullit thinks Joshua Zirkzee made the wrong choice by moving to Manchester United in the summer. However, according to Gullit, Zirkzee would have been a better fit for AC Milan, who were also interested, than for Man Utd .

arts.ttl: Dwight Yorke spots 'something not right' with Ruud van Nistelrooy's role at Man Utd
arts.sum: With United boss Erik ten Hag facing a make-or-break trip to Aston Villa with his job hanging by a thread, former United striker Yorke believes Van Nistelrooy is an obvious choice to replace the Dutchman

arts.ttl: Wonderkid confirms highly-anticipated Manchester United transfer with social media post
arts.sum: Manchester United were waiting for approval from the Premier League for the transfer of Chido Obi-Martin
